rulings.Case Title: JOUNI ABU-ZAGHIBRA VS. GRAYSTONE PARTNERS, LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday February 11, 2016, line 5. PLAINTIFF JOUNI ABU-ZAGHIBRA Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate DENIED. "[E]xcept perhaps by mutual consent of the parties, an unlawful detainer action may not generally be tried together with other causes. Childs v. Eltinge (1973) 29 Cal.App.3d 843. No mutual consent was shown by the moving party. No argument or authority cited to support departure from the general rule under the circumstances of this case, which by moving party's own admission does not involve "complex" issues. (See for example, Martin-Bragg v. Moore (2013) 219 Cal.App.4th 367). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MING YU VS. GIANKARLO MALDONADO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday February 11, 2016, line 10. DEFENDANT GIANKARLO MALDONADO, TERESA HERNANDEZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer.
